chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1522 of 2016 C.P. No.S-1738 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 28.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Leghari, Advocate alongwith petitioner in C.P. No.S-1522/2016. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, Advocate alongwith petitioner in C.P. No. S-1738/2016 Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel a/w DSP/SDPO Ali Raza Langha of Shaheed Fazil Raho District Badin and SIP Ayaz Hussain Memon SHO P.S Shaheed Fazil Raho District Badin. = Today, Mst. Rukhsana D/o Muhammad Qasim is present in Court. She being sui juris wants to go with her father Muhammad Qasim, the petitioner in C.P. No.S-1738/2016. However, Mir Muhammad S/o Rawal, the respondent No.5 is also present in Court alongwith his Counsel, who has filed C.P. No.S-1522/2016, which was ordered to be tagged with instant petition, submits that said Mst.Rukhsana is the lawfully wedded wife of Mir Muhammad S/o Rawal, the petitioner in C.P. No.S-1522/2016. Be that as it may, the detenue Mst.Rukhsana being sui juris since has made up her mind to go with her father, then in these proceedings in which the issue limited to the life and liberty of the said detenue is only involved and now stands resolved, consequently both these petitions are disposed of with the above observation and with the direction that Mst.Rukhsana is at liberty to accompany her father Muhammad Qasim, the petitioner in C.P. No.S- 1738/2016. JUDGE Shahid
